content: Ovviamente, Tom aveva un sacco per la testa, ma non avevo altra scelta che chiedergli di passare un po' di tempo per aiutarci con i nostri problemi.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Guybrush88 (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: eng:Obviously, Tom had a lot on his mind, but I had no choice but to ask him to spend some time helping us with our problems
